primary_operations.name: processStream
primary_operations.sdk_call: const it = await this._client.send(new GetShardIteratorCommand({ StreamName: this._stream, ShardId: 'shardId-000000000000', ShardIteratorType: 'LATEST' })); let cur = it.ShardIterator; while (cur) { const r = await this._client.send(new GetRecordsCommand({ ShardIterator: cur })); for (const rec of r.Records ?? []) await handler(Buffer.from(rec.Data ?? '')); cur = r.NextShardIterator; }

code_style_notes: KCL gives more control; this is the bare-bones loop
